title: Parent to Parent Networking * Foster Parents - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Foster Families > Parent to Parent Networking * Foster Parents 3 Matching Service Providers The mapped locations are estimates, for the exact location of an individual site, select "More Details" Accessibility Options - Select - No Filter Wheelchair Access (Full) Wheelchair Access (Partial) Accessible Parking (Private Lot) Accessible Parking (Nearby Public/Street Parking) Accessible Restrooms Alternative Communication Formats Virtual Service Options Staff Trained in Disability Awareness Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF ELYSIUM SANCTUARY GUARDIAN CIRCLE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Resources, outreach, and training connections are provided for those interested in becoming a resource parent, respite provider, or babysitter. Offers virtual support groups focused on sharing and self-care. Confidential Mailing Address Eligibility: Varies by service Hours: Not applicable Email Visit Website More Details FOSTERCLUB FOSTER PARENT ONLINE TRAINING Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF The online training is a subscription-based service offering interactive educational modules for credit to resource parents, supportive adults, and child welfare professionals. To confirm if earned credits are accepted, contact your local agency. 620 S Holladay Drive #1 Seaside, OR 97138 Eligibility: Resource parents, supportive adults and/or child welfare professionals Hours: Not applicable Email Get Directions Visit Website More Details OREGON POST ADOPTION RESOURCE CENTER TRAINING CALENDARS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides Oregon adoptive and assisted guardianship families with a schedule of support groups, parenting classes, and educational events 6443 SW Beaverton Hillsdale Highway Suite 205 Portland, OR 97221 Eligibility: ODHS adoptive and assisted guardianship families, or families who have adopted through any state foster care system Hours: Varies by training course Email (503) 241-0799 Get Directions Visit Website More Details FOSTERCLUB FOSTER PARENT ONLINE TRAINING OREGON POST ADOPTION RESOURCE CENTER TRAINING CALENDARS
